prompt: Create a dramatic vertical fantasy portrait of Oyagi, a powerful Japanese thunder shrine maiden suspended in a storm. She is shown from mid-thigh upward in a dynamic floating pose, body angled slightly to the right, head tilted back with a calm fierce expression, long black hair whipping in the wind, one arm extended downward-left with elegant fingers and the other lowered at her side. She wears layered white translucent kimono sleeves with delicate floral embroidery, a dark navy skirt, a white fitted bodice, ornate red waist cords and tassels, silver chains and charms, and dangling earrings with red accents. Behind her is a circular sacred halo frame holding exactly five large silver tomoe drum-like emblems: one at the top center, one upper left, one upper right, one mid-left, and one mid-right. The entire scene is monochrome deep cobalt blue with bright electric white highlights and small red accents. A jagged lightning bolt enters from the upper left, crosses in front of her extended sleeve and torso, then branches down toward the lower right, illuminating rain droplets, mist, and fabric. The background is a turbulent night thunderstorm with dark clouds, rain, water droplets on the lens, and layered silhouettes of Japanese maple leaves and flowers around the edges, especially large pale leaves at the lower left and upper right. Use cinematic photorealistic fantasy art mixed with Japanese mythological illustration, high contrast, ethereal glow, intricate costume detail, flowing translucent fabric, storm energy, sharp focus on the face, painterly blue grading, no extra characters, no modern objects. Add a small elegant signature and date in the bottom-right corner reading July 22, 2026 and Oyagi.
promptEn: Create a dramatic vertical fantasy portrait of Oyagi, a powerful Japanese thunder shrine maiden suspended in a storm. She is shown from mid-thigh upward in a dynamic floating pose, body angled slightly to the right, head tilted back with a calm fierce expression, long black hair whipping in the wind, one arm extended downward-left with elegant fingers and the other lowered at her side. She wears layered white translucent kimono sleeves with delicate floral embroidery, a dark navy skirt, a white fitted bodice, ornate red waist cords and tassels, silver chains and charms, and dangling earrings with red accents. Behind her is a circular sacred halo frame holding exactly five large silver tomoe drum-like emblems: one at the top center, one upper left, one upper right, one mid-left, and one mid-right. The entire scene is monochrome deep cobalt blue with bright electric white highlights and small red accents. A jagged lightning bolt enters from the upper left, crosses in front of her extended sleeve and torso, then branches down toward the lower right, illuminating rain droplets, mist, and fabric. The background is a turbulent night thunderstorm with dark clouds, rain, water droplets on the lens, and layered silhouettes of Japanese maple leaves and flowers around the edges, especially large pale leaves at the lower left and upper right. Use cinematic photorealistic fantasy art mixed with Japanese mythological illustration, high contrast, ethereal glow, intricate costume detail, flowing translucent fabric, storm energy, sharp focus on the face, painterly blue grading, no extra characters, no modern objects. Add a small elegant signature and date in the bottom-right corner reading July 22, 2026 and Oyagi.
promptZh: 创作一张戏剧性的垂直奇幻肖像，主角是 Oyagi，一位悬浮在风暴中的强大日本雷霆巫女。画面展示她从大腿中部向上的动态悬浮姿态，身体略微向右倾斜，头部后仰，表情冷静而凌厉，黑色长发在风中飘舞，一只手臂向左下方伸展，手指优雅，另一只手臂垂在身侧。她身穿层叠的白色半透明和服袖子，饰有精致的花卉刺绣，搭配深海军蓝裙子、白色紧身胸衣、华丽的红色腰绳和流苏、银链与挂饰，以及带有红色点缀的垂坠耳环。在她身后是一个圆形的圣洁光环框架，上面固定着 5 个大型银色巴纹鼓状徽章：顶部中心一个，左上、右上、左中、右中各一个。整个场景为单色深钴蓝色，带有明亮的电光白高光和少量红色点缀。一道锯齿状闪电从左上方切入，穿过她伸出的袖子和躯干前方，然后向右下方分叉，照亮了雨滴、薄雾和衣物。背景是汹涌的夜间雷暴，伴有乌云、雨水、镜头上的水滴，以及边缘层叠的日本枫叶和花朵剪影，尤其是左下角和右上角的大片浅色叶子。采用电影级写实奇幻艺术与日本神话插画相结合的风格，高对比度，空灵的光晕，精致的服装细节，飘逸的半透明织物，风暴能量，面部焦点清晰，绘画感蓝色调，无额外角色，无现代物品。在右下角添加一个优雅的小签名和日期，内容为 2026 年 7 月 22 日 和 Oyagi。
